title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality · Semantics Case: Typeof Inspection
summary: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js typeof inspection increment in a value-normalization and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use typeof, Array.isArray, instanceof, and explicit predicates while accounting for their boundaries.
Distinguish undefined, null, Boolean, Number, BigInt, String, Symbol, and object values by behavior and use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
